subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Javad
subcodes.first_line: Make mention of the Name of thy Lord, His servant Jawad, who came to faith and was one guided aright. And he was one established in His Cause on the Day
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر اسم ربک عبده جواد الذی آمن و هدی و استقر علی الامر فی یوم الذی زلت فیه اقدام
subcodes.subjects: @blind imitation [taqlid], @idolatry, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
